seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tregear and Trentham Cliffs. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tregear vs Trentham Cliffs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tregear and Trentham Cliffs.
heading: Tregear vs Trentham Cliffs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tregear, New South Wales and Trentham Cliffs, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tregear has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Trentham Cliffs (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tregear or Trentham Cliffs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tregear has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Trentham Cliffs scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tregear scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Trentham Cliffs scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tregear or Trentham Cliffs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tregear has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
